headline: Verizon Leans Into AI Customer Service As Valuation Signals Upside Potential
summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) CEO has outlined a major shift toward AI driven customer service. The company plans large scale use of artificial intelligence to handle routine customer queries. Management signaled that a substantial share of customer service roles will be replaced or supported by AI tools. For a company built around wireless, broadband, and enterprise connectivity, customer service sits at the core of how Verizon interacts with tens of millions of users. Across telecom,...
